title: Digital Realty (DLR) Up 26.8% in 6 Months: Will the Trend Last?
text: Robust data-center demand, strategic expansions and capital-recycling moves are likely to continue driving Digital Realty's (DLR) stock. However, stiff competition and high interest rates are woes.

title: Don't Miss the Boom: 7 AI Stocks Set to Explode Higher
text: Amidst the ever-shifting landscape of technology, artificial intelligence (AI) has been one of the biggest catalysts for the tech sphere in 2023. Even as the fanfare subsides, AI's stronghold remains undeniable, especially when eyeing the Nasdaq impressive 35% surge this year, fueled predominantly by AI tailwinds.

title: Why I Won't Buy REIT ETFs
text: REITs are offering a historic opportunity. You could profit from them by buying an ETF or individual REITs. I present 5 reasons why I won't buy a REIT ETF.

title: The State Of REITs: September 2023 Edition
text: The REIT sector gave up some of the gains achieved in June and July, with a -4.13% average total return in August. Small cap REITs (-2.49%) outperformed again in August. Micro caps (-13.08%) badly underperformed their larger REIT peers. Only 18.06% of REIT securities had a positive total return in August, with 48.13% in the black year to date.

title: 3 REITs with a Front-Row Seat to the Tech Growth Boom

title: Digital Realty Trust: Here Comes The Generative AI Boom
text: The recent generative AI boom has notably justified the embedded premium long observed in the Data Center REITs, building upon the Metaverse hype and cloud computing post-COVID-19 reopening. Therefore, while DLR may record a D- in Seeking Alpha Quant Rating, we are not concerned since the same has been observed in its peers, such as EQIX and IRM. The consensus forward estimates also suggest excellent top and bottom line expansion at CAGRs of +10.5% and +5.1% through FY2025, as the robust demand remains gated by supply.

title: Digital Realty To Provide Seamless Access to Oracle EU Sovereign Cloud
text: AUSTIN, Texas , Sept. 18, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Digital Realty (NYSE: DLR), the largest global provider of cloud- and carrier-neutral data center, colocation, and interconnection solutions, today announced it will offer connectivity to the recently-launched Oracle EU Sovereign Cloud via Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) FastConnect.

title: Make American REITs Great Again
text: REITs have underperformed in 2023, but their dividends remain consistent, and some are even raising their dividends. Quality REITs with a combination of quality and value could be a good investment opportunity. I believe that the Federal Reserve will start lowering interest rates soon, which could lead to a rise in REIT prices.

title: Digital Realty (DLR) Expands Into Rome to Boost Digital Growth
text: Digital Realty (DLR) acquires 22 hectares of land in Rome to build the city's first four-tier data center facility. The move expands its asset base in the Mediterranean region, a key connectivity hub.

title: Digital Realty Expands Mediterranean Presence with Development of New Colocation and Connectivity Hub in Rome
text: Expansion into Rome highlights Digital Realty's integrated strategy across the Mediterranean, enhancing its ability to meet growing customer demand in the region ROME , Sept. 7, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Digital Realty (NYSE: DLR), the largest global provider of cloud- and carrier-neutral data center, colocation and interconnection solutions, today announced its expansion into the Italian market following the acquisition and pre-development planning of land in Rome.
